title: Gemini 3 Flash is designed for fast, cost-efficient agent workloads
snippet: Google describes Gemini 3 Flash as a fast model with function calling, structured output, and a free API tier. Preview-model availability and limits can change.

title: Model Context Protocol standardizes how AI applications connect to tools and data
snippet: The open protocol defines common interfaces for context, tools, prompts, and resources so integrations do not need a bespoke connector for every model application.

title: DeepSeek-R1 reports stronger reasoning from reinforcement learning
snippet: The paper describes reasoning models trained with large-scale reinforcement learning and reports results across mathematics, coding, and reasoning benchmarks.

title: A small self-hosted harness combines deterministic feed detection with personality-driven analysis
snippet: NewsTeam polls RSS without model calls when nothing changed, then uses bounded agent sessions to write source-linked briefings with explicit budgets.
